plugins.name: code-reviewer-plugin
plugins.description: Deep PR review that catches logic bugs, security vulnerabilities, and performance anti-patterns beyond linting.

plugins.name: test-architect-plugin
plugins.description: Generate full test suites or fill coverage gaps across unit, integration, and e2e layers with TDD support.

plugins.name: debug-detective-plugin
plugins.description: Systematic root cause analysis that traces execution paths, ranks hypotheses, and prevents bug recurrence.

plugins.name: api-crafter-plugin
plugins.description: Design and document REST or GraphQL APIs with OpenAPI specs, naming validation, and breaking-change detection.

plugins.name: refactor-pro-plugin
plugins.description: Detect code smells and apply design patterns incrementally, explaining each change to avoid over-engineering.

plugins.name: standup-scribe-plugin
plugins.description: Reads meeting notes and threads from Slack, extracts actionable tasks, and summarises them as a clean bullet-point task list — assignee, deadline, and priority included where mentioned.
